name: ActiveOps Limited
summary: ActiveOps Limited provides management process automation software solutions worldwide. It offers Workware+ solution, including WorkiQ, an employee productivity monitoring solution to capture desktop activity for all employees working in the office or remote; and ControliQ, a cloud-based employee performance management solution. The company also provides OpsIndex to score and benchmark key metrics based on industry sector and regional trends worldwide; and Active Operation Management, an operations methodology and framework for effective back-office management. It serves business process outsourcing companies, banking, insurance, and other sectors. The company was formerly known as ACTIVE OPERATIONS MANAGEMENT INTERNATIONAL LIMITED and changed its name to ActiveOps Limited in May, 2015. ActiveOps Limited was incorporated in 1995 and is based in Reading, United Kingdom.
